new port for luaunbound 1.0.0

[NEW PORT] dns/luaunbound: Lua binding for libunbound

* simple Lua binding to libunbound
* requirement for Prosody 0.12.0

QA:

  * portlint: OK (looks fine)
  * testport: OK (poudriere: 12.3 i386/amd64, 13.0 amd64/arm64, Lua 5.1 - 5.4)
